stories.title: Implement RotatingSecrets.Registry GenServer
acceptanceCriteria: File lib/rotating_secrets/registry.ex exists
init/1 calls Process.flag(:sensitive, true) first
init/1 calls source.init(source_opts) and returns {:ok, state, {:continue, :initial_load}}
init/1 returns {:stop, {:source_init_failed, reason}} if source.init fails
handle_continue(:initial_load) calls source.load/1; on success transitions lifecycle to :valid and schedules refresh
handle_continue(:initial_load) on permanent error (:enoent, :eacces, {:invalid_option, _}) returns {:stop, {:permanent_load_failure, reason}, state}
handle_continue(:initial_load) on transient error returns {:stop, {:transient_load_failure, reason}, state}
handle_call(:current) returns {:ok, secret} when lifecycle is :valid, :refreshing, or :expiring
handle_call(:current) returns {:error, :loading} when lifecycle is :loading
handle_call({:subscribe, pid}) monitors pid and returns {:ok, sub_ref}
handle_call({:unsubscribe, sub_ref}) demonitors and returns :ok
handle_info(:do_refresh) calls source.load; on success fans out {:rotating_secret_rotated, sub_ref, name, version} to subscribers
handle_info(:do_refresh) on error schedules exponential backoff retry (min 1s, max 60s)
handle_info({:DOWN, monitor_ref, :process, _, _}) removes dead subscriber
handle_info(msg) delegates to source.handle_change_notification/2 when exported; {:changed, _} triggers refresh; :ignored is a noop
terminate/2 calls source.terminate/1 when exported
Refresh scheduling: meta[:ttl_seconds] present -> delay = trunc(ttl_seconds * 1000 * 2/3); absent -> fallback_interval_ms (default 60s)
child_spec/1 returns serializable spec with id {__MODULE__, name}, restart: :transient
mix compile in rotating_secrets/ passes with no warnings

stories.title: Unit tests for Registry GenServer
acceptanceCriteria: File test/support/mocks.ex exists with Mox.defmock(RotatingSecrets.MockSource, for: RotatingSecrets.Source)
test_helper.exs defines RotatingSecrets.MockSource mock
File test/rotating_secrets/registry_test.exs exists
Test: Registry starts and loads secret successfully via MockSource
Test: handle_call(:current) returns {:ok, secret} after successful load
Test: Registry stops with :permanent_load_failure on :enoent from source
Test: subscriber receives {:rotating_secret_rotated, sub_ref, name, version} on refresh
Test: subscriber is removed from state after DOWN message
mix test in rotating_secrets/ passes with no failures
